title: bicornella raymondiana
intro:
Bicornella raymondiana, also known as the two-horned fungus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polyporaceae and is a species of bracket fungus.

It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bicornella raymondiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. Bicornella raymondiana can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
